overall_strategy: Use the current dashboard and structured programming report pipeline as the foundation of a continuously growing CIED real-world database. The 8000 CNY self-funded project should close with a research report and platform deliverables; each later SCI paper should preferably support a separate higher-level grant.
hard_boundaries: Do not manually collect clinical outcomes at the current stage.
Do not rely on death, hospitalization, emergency visits, heart failure worsening, reoperation, infection, or lead revision as current endpoints.
Use programming report data first: device identity, programming date, implant date, settings, battery, thresholds, impedance, sensing, events, conclusions, and follow-up recommendation.
Use clinical outcomes only if they become available through automated institutional or manufacturer-supported linkage.
